final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: educational infographic, square crop
Primary request: hand-drawn style infographic explaining definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, CLI
Scene/backdrop: clean white paper texture, sketchbook aesthetic with subtle grid lines
Subject: conceptual diagram showing 7 tech terms (AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, CLI) with connecting lines and simple icons
Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration, sketch style with pencil/ink texture, infographic layout
Composition/framing: top-down view, organized flowchart structure with clear hierarchy
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight, friendly and approachable educational tone
Color palette: muted pastels with black ink lines, occasional soft blue and orange accents
Materials/textures: paper grain texture, hand-drawn line quality, marker highlights
Text (verbatim): "AI、MCP、AI Agent、OpenClaw、AI Skill、蒸馏、CLI"
Constraints: keep all 7 terms clearly visible with their definitions, show logical connections between related concepts, maintain hand-drawn aesthetic throughout
Avoid: corporate flat design, 3D renders, photorealistic elements, cluttered layout, overly complex diagrams
